summary: WAZA Grow Module Frontend Testing - Complete testing of all Grow frontend pages and integrations. All 20 backend tests passed. All frontend pages working correctly. Fixed 1 backend bug (timezone issue in campaign status update).
seed_data_creation: Database seeded with admin and demo users. Test campaigns created during backend testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: WAZA Grow module is fully functional. grow_enabled flag is currently FALSE (reset after testing). Meta Marketing API is MOCKED - campaign activation generates random mock results. AI creative generation uses Claude with fallback to mock.

features_verified: Waitlist count display with social proof
WAZA Grow link in navbar (orange color)
'Decouvrir WAZA Grow' CTA button linking to /grow
'Coming Soon' teaser card with 'WAZA Grow SOON' badge
WAZA GROW section header in orange
Stats WAZA Grow section (subscribers, campaigns, MRR, waitlist, budget)
Waitlist management (list, CSV export, notify all)
Campaign list with status badges (Active, Brouillon)
Step 1: Campaign name input, 4 objective options

backend_endpoints_tested.GET /api/grow/waitlist/count: 200 OK - Returns count with social proof padding
backend_endpoints_tested.GET /api/grow/plans: 200 OK - Returns Starter/Pro/Agency plans with pricing
backend_endpoints_tested.GET /api/grow/subscription: 200 OK - Returns user subscription or null
backend_endpoints_tested.GET /api/grow/fb-account: 200 OK - Returns FB account or null
backend_endpoints_tested.PUT /api/grow/campaigns/{id}/status: 200 OK - Updates status, generates mock results

bug_fixed.issue: TypeError: can't subtract offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes
bug_fixed.fix: Added timezone handling for campaign.start_date and campaign.created_at before datetime subtraction

mocked_integrations.meta_marketing_api: Facebook Ads API is mocked. Campaign activation generates random mock results (impressions, clicks, conversions, ROAS).
mocked_integrations.ai_creative_generation: Uses Claude AI with fallback to mock headlines/descriptions if AI fails.

notes.feature_flag_state: grow_enabled is currently FALSE (reset after testing). Set to TRUE to enable Grow module in dashboard.
notes.french_language: All UI text is in French as expected for African market.
notes.pricing: Plans are in FCFA (Starter: 15,000, Pro: 35,000, Agency: 75,000)
